name: YungShin Global Holding Corporation
summary: YungShin Global Holding Corporation, through its subsidiaries, produces and sells pharmaceutical products. The company offers medicines and feed additives for swine, ruminants, poultry, pets, and aquatics; APIs, API intermediates, and specialty chemicals, as well as CRO and CMO services; herbal products; health foods; and beauty care products. It also operates EYES testing laboratories for food safety testing; and offers western medicines, agricultural products, chemical intermediates, and over-the-counter medicines. In addition, the company imports and exports pharmaceuticals, APIs, bio-products, and functional food materials; exports medicine-manufacturing machines and components, and medicine/food ingredients, as well as related materials, such as ampoules and vials; imports tablet-analysis equipment; and operates a nursing home for senior care. It operates in Taiwan, China, the United States, Japan, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Singapore, Thailand, Indonesia, Cambodia, and South Africa. The company was founded in 1952 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
